name_en: New LE 57 Shoulder Bag. This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
name_cn:
